item.title: Ford Motor Company: FUEL SYSTEM, GASOLINE:FUEL INJECTION SYSTEM:INJECTORS Recall (2024 ford mustang)
item.summary: Ford Motor Company (Ford) is recalling certain 2023 Lincoln Corsair, 2023-2024 Escape, 2024 Mustang, and 2025 Explorer vehicles. The fuel injectors may have been assembled without O-ring support discs, which can result in a fuel leak.
item.affectedPeople: A fuel leak in the presence of an ignition source increases the risk of a fire.
item.remedy: Dealers will install new fuel injector O-rings and O-ring support discs, free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed on October 7, 2024. Owners may contact Ford customer service at 1-866-436-7332. Ford's number for this recall is 24S54.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
